ddls:
CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the manufacturer's official website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the manufacturer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manufacturer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manufacturer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compatibility_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility study */,
  "study_title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "study_date" TEXT /* Date the study was conducted */,
  "study_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the study findings */,
  "study_location" TEXT /* Location where the study was conducted */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator of the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Design of the study (e.g., randomized controlled trial) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "reference_title" TEXT /* Title of the reference */,
  "reference_date" TEXT /* Date the reference was published */,
  "reference_url" TEXT /* URL to the reference document */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the reference */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the reference was published */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers of the reference in the journal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compatibility_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_code" TEXT /* Code for the compatibility status (C for Compatible, I for Incompatible) */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the compatibility status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_compatibility" (
  "compatibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility entry */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance with which the drug is being tested */,
  "compatibility_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compatibility status */,
  "compatibility_duration" TEXT /* Duration of compatibility */,
  "compatibility_temperature" TEXT /* Temperature at which compatibility was tested */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used to test compatibility (e.g., visual, chemical) */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Detailed results of the compatibility test */,
  "reference_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the reference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the compatibility record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the compatibility record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compatibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_compatibility_compatibility_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("compatibility_status_id") REFERENCES compatibility_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_compatibility_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_compatibility_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substances" (
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substance */,
  "substance_name" TEXT /* Name of the substance */,
  "concentration" TEXT /* Concentration of the substance */,
  "concentration_type" TEXT /* Type of concentration (e.g., mg/mL, mcg/mL) */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the substance */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the substance */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions required for storing the substance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the substance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the substance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pharmacist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user (for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the drug data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the drug data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_versions_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
